title: Wartaki clay pipe
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Wartaki clay pipe''' was a [[Smoking/Legends|smoking]] implement favored by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]],<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> and made with [[Clay/Legends|clay]] from the [[Wartaki Islands/Legends|Wartaki Islands]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].<ref name="FF42">{{FactFile|42|KAS 1-4|Kashyyyk}}</ref> A Wookiee gave a Wartaki clay [[Pipe/Legends|pipe]] to [[Professor/Legends|Professor]] [[Callow Batta]] as a present. Batta used the pipe to smoke [[wroshyr cavendish]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
